She {piles} her clothes on the chair instead of hanging them.
He {piled} firewood near the door.
She {piled} too much food on her plate.
He {piled} blankets on the couch for a cozy movie night.
examples.source: Rahat bir film gecesi için koltuk üzerine battaniyeler yığdı.

examples.target: She {piled} up the papers before filing them.
He {piles} his work up and then rushes to finish.
examples.source: İşini biriktirir ve sonra bitirmek için acele eder.

examples.target: She {piled} the gifts under the tree.
He {piled} the crates against the wall.
She {trimmed} the hedge along the fence.
He {trimmed} his beard neatly before the event.
She {trims} the plant every spring.
He {trimmed} the fat from the meat before cooking.
She {trimmed} her hair at home to save money.
examples.source: Para biriktirmek için saçını evde kesti.

examples.target: He {trimmed} the paper to fit the frame.
She {trimmed} the crusts off the sandwiches.
He {trimmed} the lawn edges with a small tool.
examples.source: Küçük bir aletle çim kenarlarını düzeltti.

examples.target: She {trims} her nails every week.
He {trimmed} the report down to two pages.
She {spread} butter on the toast.
He {spread} the map out on the table.
She {spread} a blanket on the grass for the picnic.
He {spreads} kindness wherever he goes.
The fire {spread} quickly through the dry forest.
examples.source: Yangın kuru orman içinden hızla yayıldı.

examples.target: She {spread} the frosting evenly over the cake.
examples.source: Kremayı pastanın üzerine eşit şekilde sürdü.

examples.target: He {spread} the seeds across the garden bed.
She {spread} the news quickly through the group chat.
examples.source: Haberi grup sohbeti üzerinden hızla yaydı.

examples.target: He {spread} the work over several days.
She {spread} her arms wide and smiled.
